ham.subject: Ticket ABC-1234 Resolved – Merge Request Approved
ham.body:
Hi team,

The merge request for ticket ABC-1234 has been reviewed and approved. The changes have been merged into the main branch. You can find the commit here:
<URL>

Key updates:
- Fixed null pointer exception in UserService.
- Updated API documentation.

Please test in staging and let me know if any issues arise.

Thanks,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: IT Ticket #98765 – Password Reset
spam.body:
Hello [Name],

We have detected an unauthorized login attempt on your corporate account. To secure your data, please follow the link below to reset your password immediately:
<URL>

If you do not reset your password within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily locked for security reasons.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
IT Support Team
